name: polarcopilot-opensource
description: PolarCopilot Hub Web + MCP — open source edition

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix hub && npm install --prefix web && npm install --prefix mcp-server
scripts.build:web: bash scripts/copy-readme-images.sh && npm run build --prefix web
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run build:web && npm run setup:mcp
